title: Create Phase 0 foundation for Bookforge project:
job:
Create Phase 0 foundation for Bookforge project:
1. Create Bookforge/ directory structure with:
   - pyproject.toml
   - literary_ai/ (package dir)
   - tests/
   - README.md
2. Implement ollama_client.py with Ollama HTTP integration
3. Create artifact schema files in literary_ai/
4. Implement SQLite store stub in literary_ai/
5. Build Typer CLI skeleton with init/status commands
6. Write README.md with installation instructions
7. Ensure all files are under Bookforge/ directory
8. Run gates: pip install -e ., pytest, CLI help, init/status test
9. Commit to job/bookforge-phase0 branch and open PR to main
